name: @metorial/klipfolio
description: Manage business dashboards, data visualizations, and analytics. Create and configure dashboards (tabs), build and update Klip visualizations with custom schemas, and connect to various data sources including REST/URL and service connectors. Manage users, roles, groups, and permissions for access control. Handle client accounts for multi-tenant setups, publish shareable dashboard links, refresh and upload data source instances, and embed PowerMetrics visualizations externally.
